quotes: **Data tone:** when citing clinical data, avoid negative or fear-based language; use an empathetic, supportive, trust-building tone without oversimplifying. Example pattern: "Participants in the VALOR study taking LISRAYA had nearly 50% more improvement in their DM symptoms after one year compared to placebo."

rules.rule_text: When citing clinical data, avoid negative or fear-based language. Use an empathetic, supportive, trust-building tone without oversimplifying. For example, use patterns like: 'Participants in the VALOR study taking LISRAYA had nearly 50% more improvement in their DM symptoms after one year compared to placebo.'
